summary.intent: Fix failing unit tests in FrameCompleteHandlerTests, specifically testDependRetryExhausted which expected retry count 1 but got 0.
summary.outcome: Investigation was interrupted before a fix was applied; only the testing pipeline workflow file was modified.

repo: OpenCue cuebot has a FrameCompleteHandler with dependency retry logic that is tested in FrameCompleteHandlerTests
The test failure indicates satisfyWhatDependsOn or retry exhaustion logic may not be incrementing a counter as expected

code.finding: executeDependWithRetry asserts retry count equals 1; testDependRetryExhausted calls it and was getting 0 instead
Contains retry/satisfyWhatDependsOn logic that was being investigated as the source of the bug

workflow: The test log shows 'mode [null]' which may indicate a test setup issue with null mode on a frame or job entity

friction: User interrupted the investigation before root cause was identified or fix applied
The 'mode [null]' log message suggests a potential null setup issue in test fixtures that wasn't fully diagnosed
open_items: Root cause of testDependRetryExhausted failure not identified — retry count returning 0 instead of 1 needs investigation in FrameCompleteHandler retry logic
Determine what 'mode [null]' refers to and whether it is a symptom or a separate issue
The .github/workflows/testing-pipeline.yml was modified but the change content is unknown — verify it is intentional and correct
